title: 13. CI/CD — GitHub Actions, supply chain, CD gate
description: ci.yml tests+scans+eval; cd.yml deploy after gates; secret scan, SBOM mindset.
story:
CI (Continuous Integration): every push/PR runs automated checks.
CD (Continuous Delivery/Deploy): promote artifacts after gates.

This repo workflows:
• ci.yml — gitleaks, ruff, pytest, eval smoke, frontend, images, Trivy/SBOM/sign where configured
• cd.yml — eval-gate then deploy strategy
• eval-nightly.yml — fuller eval against graph

Supply chain: don't just test code — scan secrets, deps, container images.
one_liner: PR: lint+test+eval smoke; release: stronger gates then deploy.
why_it_matters: Prevents broken GraphRAG or open secrets from shipping.
Eval gate ties ML/quality to delivery.
say_aloud: CI runs on main and feature branches.
Eval smoke is part of CI.
CD should not skip the eval gate.

beats.title: CI job spine (conceptual)
beats.narrative: You don't need every YAML line — you need the job story.
beats.code:
# .github/workflows/ci.yml (mental model)
on: push/PR → main, feature/**

jobs:
  secret-scan:  gitleaks
  test:
    - setup Python 3.12
    - ruff check + format
    - pytest (multi-source + full)
    - eval smoke
    - frontend build checks
  # image build/scan/sign steps as configured for supply chain
beats.say_after: Secrets first, then quality, then artifacts.

line_quiz.answer: Fail before wasting CI on leaked credentials
choices: Fail before wasting CI on leaked credentials
line_quiz.why: Stop the pipeline if secrets appear.

concepts.definition: CI verifies every change; CD ships verified artifacts.
concepts.say_aloud: Integrate continuously; deliver when gates pass.

self_quiz.q: Which eval suite in PR CI?

common_mistakes: Deploying from main without eval gate.
final_boss: Whiteboard CI stages for this monorepo.
